metadata.title: You're The First, The Last, My Everything
metadata.lyrics:
[00:01.64] We got it together didn't we?

[00:02.45] Isn't that nice?
[00:02.69] I mean, really, when you really sit and think about it
[00:02.92] Isn't it really, really nice?
[00:03.28] I can easily feel myself slipping more and more ways
[00:04.33] That super world of my own
[00:05.08] Nobody but you and me
[00:05.45] We've got it together baby
[00:06.33] Ahh, the first, my last, my everything
[00:15.37] And the answer to all my dreams
[00:22.67] You're my sun, my moon, my guiding star
[00:29.95] My kind of wonderful, that's what you are
[00:37.66] I know there's only, only one like you
[00:44.96] There's no way, they could have made two

[00:56.76] Your love I'll keep for evermore
[01:00.22] You're the first, you're the last, my everything
[01:10.60] In you, I've found so many things
[01:18.24] A love so new only you could bring
[01:24.55] Can't you see if you
[01:29.54] You make me feel this way
[01:34.68] You're like a first morning dew
[01:37.13] On a brand new day
[01:40.12] I see so many ways that I
[01:47.74] Can love you, 'til the day I die
[01:55.40] You're my reality, yet I'm lost in a dream
[02:02.58] You're the first, the last, my everything
[02:39.07] I know there's only, only one like you
[02:46.42] There's no way they could have made two
[02:53.83] Girl you're my reality
[02:58.12] But I'm lost in a dream
[03:01.41] You're the first, you're the last, my everything
[03:16.99] You and me baby
[03:19.31] Just you and me
[03:21.83] Ya you are the first, the last
[03:23.67] My everything
